info.name: LunoTrading V2 — Full API Test Suite
info.description: Complete Postman collection for LunoTrading V2. Import this file, then set the BASE_URL environment variable to http://localhost:5000. After a successful login, copy the accessToken into ACCESS_TOKEN and the refreshToken into REFRESH_TOKEN. Use the Admin login to populate ADMIN_TOKEN.

request.description: STEP: After this, go to MongoDB and manually set role: 'admin' and emailVerified: true for this user. Then login as admin.
Use this BEFORE verifying email via the verify-email endpoint

exec: console.log('✅ Tokens saved to collection variables');

request.description: Requires: admin account exists AND emailVerified=true AND role='admin' in MongoDB

exec: pm.test('Does not reveal email existence', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.equal('Invalid credentials'));
pm.test('No refresh token message', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.equal('No refresh token provided'));
pm.test('Always returns success', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.include('If that email is registered'));
pm.test('Status 200 (never reveals if email exists)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
pm.test('Same message as registered', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.include('If that email is registered'));
pm.test('Invalid or expired message', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.include('Invalid or expired'));

item.name: Reset Password — Reuse Same Token (expect 400 — security check)

exec: pm.test('Token already cleared from DB', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.include('Invalid or expired'));

request.description: Run AFTER the valid reset succeeds. Same token must be rejected.

item.name: Update Profile — Try to Change Email (expect 400)

exec: pm.test('Cannot change email directly', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.include('Email address cannot be changed'));

formdata.description: Select any JPG, PNG, or PDF file from your computer

request.description: IMPORTANT: Select a real JPG/PNG/PDF file in the 'proof' field. The file picker appears when you click on the field in Postman.

exec: pm.test('Proof required message', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.include('Proof of deposit file is required'));

request.description: Requires user to have sufficient balance. First approve a deposit via admin endpoints.

exec: pm.test('All documents required message', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.include('All three documents are required'));

request.description: Run this AFTER admin approves the KYC submission

item.name: Update Deposit Addresses — Admin Full Update
Update Deposit Addresses — Admin Partial Update (USDT only)

request.description: Run AFTER freezing the user. The 403 should include the freeze reason.
Run AFTER approving the deposit. Should reject double-approval.

exec: pm.test('Rejection reason saved', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().deposit.rejectionReason).to.equal('Unable to verify proof of payment'));

request.description: FIX B4 confirmed: This is PUT not DELETE

request.description: FIX B2: Rejection REFUNDS the balance that was held. Balance is restored to user.

exec: pm.test('FIX B1: Did not crash (UserModel bug fixed)', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(200));

request.description: FIX B1: This was crashing because it used UserModel (undefined). Now uses User correctly.

exec: pm.test('Reason required message', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.equal('Rejection reason is required'));

item.name: Access Admin Route as Regular User (expect 403)

exec: pm.test('Invalid or expired token', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.equal('Invalid or expired token'));
